lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

Step into perfection with this absolute gem! This car is in mint condition, meticulously maintained and looking as flawless as the day it rolled off the lot. From the pristine interior to the gleaming exterior, it truly represents the gold standard of care. This is a rare find for the discerning driver who wants nothing but the best!

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant scratches, dents, and rust. The interior upholstery is heavily worn and damaged. The engine and mechanical systems require major repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a reliable daily driver for someone who isn't looking for perfection. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some sun fading on the roof. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though the front tires are nearing the end of their life and there is a slight squeak in the suspension over bumps. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some staining on the driver's seat and general wear throughout. It has been regularly serviced, but expect to invest in some minor maintenance soon to keep it in top shape.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor paint chips. The interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should, with no known mechanical issues. The interior is clean, showing only minor wear consistent with its age, and all electronics are fully functional. On the exterior, you will find a few minor paint chips and light surface scratches, but no major dents or rust. It is a reliable daily driver that has recently had its fluids changed and is ready for its next owner.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously maintained mechanical components, reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. This is an acquisition for the discerning client who demands nothing less than absolute excellence and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, this beauty is in incredible shape. It’s been babied since day one—always garaged, meticulously cleaned, and it honestly feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no spills, just pure driving perfection! I'm so sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be over the moon with it. Come take a look, you won’t be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example of high-revving naturally aspirated precision. Powered by the S54B32 inline-six, the engine features individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a linear power band to an 8,000 RPM redline. This chassis has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including documented rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with the M Variable Differential Lock for superior lateral dynamics. The exterior retains its original factory finish with zero oxidation, while the cabin remains showroom-fresh with supple Nappa leather and no bolster wear. Mechanically flawless and strictly maintained, this vehicle represents the zenith of BMW's analog driving era.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history included. Immaculate interior.

This is a rare opportunity to own a truly collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior is finished in a stunning, deep gloss paint that has been professionally ceramic coated and meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage. There are absolutely no dings, scratches, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition, featuring supple leather seats with no bolster wear, original factory floor mats, and a smoke-free environment. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history from authorized dealerships and exceptionally low mileage. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the tires are near-new. This vehicle is the definition of 'mint,' offering a level of preservation that is nearly impossible to find on the secondary market.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine, showroom condition. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this vehicle stands as a testament to automotive excellence. Serious inquiries are invited for this investment-grade acquisition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail has been meticulously maintained to ensure an uncompromising driving experience. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty to believe it! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s still in total showroom condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot. It drives like an absolute dream and looks even better in person. I’m looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Offered is a collector-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of BMW’s naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 power plant
Used car. Mint condition. Low mileage. Single owner. Garage stored. Clean title. No defects.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom-perfect condition. The original factory paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, preserved by a high-end ceramic coating and a life spent in a climate-controlled garage. There are no stone chips, door dings, or blemishes to be found anywhere on the body. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats show absolutely no bolster wear, and the dashboard is free of any fading or imperfections. Mechanically, it is flawless, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with full documentation included. The engine bay is detailed to perfection, and the undercarriage is exceptionally clean. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers a drive as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously serviced and handled with the utmost care, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a definitive testament to automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly mint condition, boasting a flawless aesthetic and rigorous mechanical integrity. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our premier inventory benchmarks. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Showroom condition. Full maintenance records included.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a flawless, high-gloss finish completely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior remains in factory-new condition, featuring supple, unscuffed premium leather and that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, documented service history and an engine bay so clean it reflects its rigorous maintenance schedule. From the pristine undercarriage to the crystal-clear glass, every detail has been curated to satisfy the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, it has been meticulously maintained to ensure an unrivaled driving experience. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawless interior appointments, reflects a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. This is an exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior finish or interior appointments. Rigorously inspected to ensure peak mechanical performance, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! It’s in such incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like a total dream. You won’t find a single flaw on it! It’s ready for a new home and some fresh adventures. Come take a look, I promise you're going to fall in love with it!

Offering a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) finished in Alpine White over Cinnamon Nappa leather. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, it has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance including a Beisan Systems VANOS rebuild, rod bearing replacement with ARP bolts, and a structural subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains taut with OEM-spec bushings and an M-variable limited-slip differential. Every panel retains its original factory finish with matching VIN tags, and the Style 67 forged wheels are free of any cosmetic defects. This is a collector-tier specimen with zero deferred maintenance, optimized for the discerning purist.
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster with no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and ceramic coated. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show zero wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did on day one. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, backed by a meticulous, comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance. With exceptionally low mileage and a smoke-free, pet-free history, this car offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection. It drives as tightly and smoothly as the day it was first delivered.

Presented in impeccable, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior. Mechanically indistinguishable from new, this investment-grade specimen has been meticulously curated for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection. An exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle of this caliber.
